subject: ENGLISH
title: Use simple sentences to express ideas about
objective: Use simple sentences to express ideas about national themes.
introduction: Can you read a word without sounding it out? That's what we call a SIGHT WORD! Today we explore: Use simple sentences to express ideas about national themes.. Let's build your reading superpowers! 🦸
